prompt: Contemporary cultural fusion logo on pure black background. Two letter M's constructed using the visual language of Japanese mon (family crest) design — perfectly symmetrical, geometric, using circles and straight lines to form the MM shape within a circular boundary. The design is white on black, extremely clean and balanced, with one accent in electric cyan (#00E3FF) — a single circle or line that breaks the symmetry. Below the circular emblem, 'MM AGENCY.' in minimal sans-serif uppercase with wide letter spacing and cyan dot. The aesthetic is East-meets-West — the precision of Japanese design with Western typography. Timeless, balanced, refined. Vector sharp quality, professional brand identity.
